'''âp-t-p-s''' ('''kapatpesoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:albitise|albitise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-t-p-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:albitise|albitise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âp-t-p-s
|-
! Lemma
| kapatpesoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thipatpesoko|thipatpesoko]] || [[word:jipatpesoko|jipatpesoko]] || [[word:shipatpesoko|shipatpesoko]] || [[word:kipatpesoko|kipatpesoko]]
